name: Chili Quiche
recipeIngredient: 8 oz green chili, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 9 x 13 pan in the oven.
2. Beat eggs lightly.
3. Add flour, baking powder, and salt; mix well.
4. Add melted butter, cottage cheese, cheeses, and peppers.
5. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15 minutes.
6. Reduce temperature to 350°F (175°C) and bake for 35-40 minutes, or until firm.
7. May be frozen and reheated.
